name: ucvg-demo
description: Zero-dependency fixture repo for the RFC-0043 UCVG live demo (AISDLC-520 AQ2). Runs entirely offline under the --network=none sandbox via `node --test`.

scripts.test: node --test --experimental-test-coverage 2>&1 | tee ./ucvg-cov.txt; awk -F'|' '/all files/{gsub(/ /,"",$2); if($2!="") print "Lines: " $2 "%"}' ./ucvg-cov.txt
